subcodes.first_line: The Book hath descended in truth from the heaven of the Will of the All-Merciful as a bounty unto all creation. Blessed is he who pondereth upon it, and woe [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من سماء مشیه الرحمن فضلا علی الامکان طوبی لمن یتفکر فیه و ویل
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
